title: 水深仅1米，100多名女生却同时溺水，是什么把她们瞬间拖入海底？ | 原文
content: On July 28, 1955, over 200 female students from Kakehi No. 2 High School in Mie Prefecture, Japan, participated in a regular swim training session at the shallow Wakamura Beach, where the water averaged just one meter deep. Within a few minutes, about 100 girls began drowning simultaneously near the northeast corner of the swimming area. Despite rescue efforts by staff and bystanders, 36 students and one teacher died. The incident remains a tragic example of mass drowning in shallow water.
eventKey: 水深仅1米-100多名女生却同时溺水-是什么把她们瞬间拖入海底
normalizedTitle: 水深仅1米 100多名女生却同时溺水 是什么把她们瞬间拖入海底 原文

content: Pam Bondi’s long tenure as Florida’s attorney general was marked by steadfast loyalty to the Republican agenda, yet her career hit limits when she faced criticism over her handling of the state’s post‑Hurricane Maria law review and her support for Florida’s controversial election law amendments. title: 6 亿美元 OpenAI 股份在二级市场无人问津，Anthropic 遭疯抢
content: Demand for OpenAI shares in the private secondary market has plummeted, with roughly six institutions offering $600 million worth of stock and no buyers finding interest. Investors have shifted to Anthropic, a rival that attracts record demand and offers a much lower valuation. Major banks, including Morgan Stanley and Goldman Sachs, now provide OpenAI shares to wealth clients without performance fees, while still charging for Anthropic placements.
eventKey: 亿美元-openai-股份在二级市场无人问津-anthropic-遭疯抢
normalizedTitle: 6 亿美元 openai 股份在二级市场无人问津 anthropic 遭疯抢

title: 马斯克回应 OpenAI 股票在二级市场遇冷：毫不意外
content: OpenAI’s shares are struggling in the secondary market, with investors moving toward competitor Anthropic. Tesla CEO Elon Musk said this was unsurprising. Anthropic has seen a record high demand, with institutions ready to invest billions, contrasting with the roughly $600 million of OpenAI stock hard to sell. Differences in risk-reward assessments and operational factors drive the divergence, and banking pricing strategies reflect it. Despite lawsuits with the U.S. Defense Department and security concerns, Anthropic’s momentum keeps narrowing the valuation gap with OpenAI.
eventKey: 马斯克回应-openai-股票在二级市场遇冷-毫不意外
normalizedTitle: 马斯克回应 openai 股票在二级市场遇冷 毫不意外

content: Qatar Airways will resume several routes to China from May 16, including Doha‑Hangzhou, Doha‑Chongqing, and Doha‑Chengdu, and has already restored regular flights to Beijing, Shanghai, Guangzhou, and Hong Kong. title: 霍金：我在二十一岁时，对自己的期望就降到了零。从那以后的一切，都是额外的礼物
content:
想象一下这种心态的力量。每一个能呼吸的早晨，都是意外之喜。每一次和朋友的聊天，都是赚到的。每一次在公园散步，都是命运多给的奖赏。当你的期望低到了地面，现实的每一寸都在你的期望之上，快乐因此无处不在。 这不是阿Q式的自我欺骗，也不是消极的认命。它是一种经过刻意训练的认知框架——把"理所当然"替换成"难能可贵"，把"这是我应得的"替换成"这是我额外收到的"。

现代社会最擅长做的事之一，是把奢侈变成标配，把特权变成基准线。

我们从不为干净的饮水感到庆幸，从不为不用挨饿感到幸运，从不为能用手机和世界连接感到神奇——因为我们早已把这一切当成了最低标准。而洛克菲勒…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资
eventKey: 我在二十一岁时-对自己的期望就降到了零-从那以后的一切-都是额外的礼物
normalizedTitle: 霍金 我在二十一岁时 对自己的期望就降到了零 从那以后的一切 都是额外的礼物

title: 能源危机是如何演变的
content: Energia危机的演变始于能源供应与需求失衡。全球化后，依赖进口能源增加，价格波动加剧。政策不确定、地缘冲突和环境法规导致原料短缺和价格飙升。再加上技术和产业结构调整迟缓，能源系统难以及时应对供需变化。各国纷纷转向可再生能源和储能，以降低依赖并提高供应弹性。

content: The article reports that on February 24, 2026, at El Dorado International Airport in Bogotá, a 42‑year‑old Russian man named Denis Alimov was detained by immigration officials on a red Interpol notice. content: Microsoft plans to release a large, cutting‑edge AI model next year to compete with OpenAI and Anthropic. The new model aims to achieve state‑of‑the‑art performance in text, image, and audio generation by 2027. Microsoft is currently developing a voice‑to‑text model that already outperforms rivals on certain benchmarks, while expanding compute capacity with Nvidia GB200 chips. The company is integrating greater computing power over the next 12–18 months to develop broader AI capabilities.

The sovereign wealth fund is considering investing $5 billion in the U.S. launch. title: 如何评价 Google 发布的开源大模型 Gemma4？使用体验怎么样？
content: Google announced Gemma 4, an open‑source language model available in four sizes: a 2‑billion‑parameter efficient model (E2B), a 4‑billion‑parameter efficient model (E4B), a 26‑billion‑parameter mixture‑of‑experts model (MoE), and a 31‑billion‑parameter dense model (31B). The release is expected to offer more scalable and customizable options for developers, though detailed performance metrics and user experience reviews are pending.

title: Fragments: April  2
content: The article discusses how generative AI is reshaping software engineering, introducing a “tri‑system” view of cognition that adds an AI layer to Kahneman’s System 1/2. It highlights three types of debt—technical, cognitive, intent—accumulating in code, people, and artifacts, and suggests diagnosing and mitigating them. It argues that, as agents handle execution, human work shifts to designing verification, defining quality, and managing ambiguous cases. Finally, it notes ongoing debates about the future of source code and the need for shared language and intent in AI‑augmented development.

normalizedTitle: fragments april 2

title: 🌟[Dooong AI] 天才程序员复活 公益站 GPT5~5.4(CodeX) 开放注册
content: Dooong AI has launched open registration for developers to access its new GPT‑5 and related models. After successful high‑concurrency testing with 800 programmers, the service is stable at 40% server load. The platform enforces strict security, including risk‑weighted monitoring, T+1 and random bans, IP bans, and prohibits email registration—only OAuth is allowed. Eligible models include GPT‑5, CodeX, MiniMax, Kimi GPT‑5.4, among others. (Under 80 words.)

title: 经济学人｜全球住房最难以负担的地方并非你所想之处 | 原文
content: A report by *The Economist* finds that the world’s hardest housing markets are in Asia, not in New York or London. Cities such as Delhi, Manila and Phnom Penh face severe crises, with premium apartments costing up to 20 times a family’s yearly income. Tens of millions of homes are missing, driving many into slums and hampering economic growth. The article suggests that smarter land use, public‑private partnerships and financial innovation could restore livability.

title: Rocket Close transforms mortgage document processing with Amazon Bedrock and Amazon Textract
content: Rocket Close, a Detroit title and appraisal firm, automated its mortgage abstract processing using Amazon Textract for OCR and Amazon Bedrock for AI-driven document segmentation and data extraction. The two‑stage pipeline handles 2,000 daily packages (≈75 pages each), reducing processing time from 10 hours to under 2 minutes—15× faster—while maintaining ~90 % accuracy across 60 document classes. The solution scales to 500,000+ documents annually, cuts costs, improves consistency, and enables future expansion into additional loan‑processing workflows.
source: Artificial Intelligence - Jeremy Little, Chris Day

title: [求教] 带队采购 API 中转，怎么实锤对方不是在用低配模型“挂羊头卖狗肉”？
content:
看了一圈市面上的中转站，感觉水太深了。 最近打算给团队统一采购，手头还有不少企业客户资源想顺便带进去。

我问用过中转站的工程师：“你用了好几家，你怎么确定对面给的是真 Opus ？万一是使用别的廉价模型，你能发现吗？”

结果同事回我三个字：“这还真不知道”

这就很尴尬了。

想请教下 V 站的各位技术大佬：

除了靠感觉“盲测”，有没有什么硬核的技术手段（比如特定的 Prompt 陷阱或 Response 特征）能 100% 验证模型身份？

你们都是怎么识别的啊？

title: AI Agent 输出翻车这件事，我踩了 30 天才找到规律
content:
I spent 30 days troubleshooting unstable output from a multi‑agent automation system using OpenClaw. The main issues were:

1. Token limit overflow made the model “forget” early instructions; compressing context and putting key directives in the system prompt helped.  
2. Prompt ambiguity accumulated over many tasks; adding negative examples and regularly refining with failures fixed drift.  
3. Tool‑call failures caused agents to hallucinate results; enforcing error‑exit reporting stopped this.  
4. Long conversations caused role drift; reinserting the role prompt periodically maintained consistency.

Implementing these fixes improved stability considerably, though more refinement is possible.
eventKey: agent-输出翻车这件事-我踩了-天才找到规律

title: 共享现实驱动的 Agent 协调理论，关于 multi-agent 的一些个人见解
content: The author proposes a “fact‑driven” coordination model for multi‑agent systems, arguing that shared observations of reality should be the primary communication primitive rather than command messages. Facts are broadcast on a bus; agents filter and decide whether to act, optionally claiming exclusive responsibility. This model scales better with dynamic populations, naturally builds workflows through causal chains, and reduces the need for central orchestrators. The author draws parallels to ant pheromones, CAN bus, and blackboard systems, noting that a separate command plane is still necessary for arbitration and control.
eventKey: 共享现实驱动的-agent-协调理论-multi-agent-的一些个人见解
normalizedTitle: 共享现实驱动的 agent 协调理论 关于 multi-agent 的一些个人见解

title: Fedora 拒绝使用 systemd 管理用户环境变量提案
content:
Fedora工程与指导委员会（FESCo）本周正式否决了一项针对Fedora 45的变更提案，该提案计划利用systemd的环境生成器功能来管理用户级环境变量。这一决定引发了开源社区对systemd集成边界问题的再次讨论。 该提案的核心内容是使用systemd.environment-generator替代传统的shell配置文件（如~/.bashrc等）来管理用户环境变量。提案方认为，这种方式能够简化环境变量的传播机制，使环境变量变更独立于用户的默认shell选择，同时对使用Fish、Dash等替代shell的用户更加友好。

然而…

title: CrateDB 6.2.4 发布，分布式 SQL 数据库
content:
CrateDB 是一个分布式的 SQL 数据库，使得实时存储和分析大量的机器数据变得简单。CrateDB 提供了通常与 NoSQL 数据库相关的可扩展性和灵活性，最小的 CrateDB 集群可以轻松地每秒摄取数万条记录。这些数据可以在整个集群中实时地、临时地、并行地进行查询。 CrateDB 6.2.4 现已正式发布，该版本更新内容如下：

修复了当使用批量机制执行插入语句且输出通道跟不上时，发送给 PostgreSQL 客户端的响应可能会乱序的问题。
修复了一个问题：如果使用包含相关子查询的查询，且该子查询的WHERE子句中包含一个等值表达式…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖
eventKey: cratedb-分布式-sql-数据库
normalizedTitle: cratedb 6 2 4 发布 分布式 sql 数据库
representativeSources: 开源中国-全部 - 白开水不加糖

title: 腾讯就 WorkBuddy 登录异常致歉：将向所有受影响国内用户补偿 1000 Credits
content:
今天上午，部分用户在使用腾讯WorkBuddy时遇到登录异常。针对这一情况，腾讯云官方已发布致歉声明，并同步推出补偿措施。 据官方通报，4月2日09:10，腾讯云监测到部分国内用户出现WorkBuddy登录异常，主要表现为：

页面提示504服务错误

无法正常登录

登录后出现闪退或页面加载失败

经工程师紧急处理，问题于11:45逐步修复。截至12:12，官方确认服务已全面恢复稳定。

为表达歉意，腾讯云将向所有受影响的国内用户提供以下补偿：

补偿内容：1000 Credits

发放方式：2个工作日内自动发放至受影响用户的…
